header_description: Manage local transcription and AI notes engines. Both run on-device and keep meeting data on your Mac.
stt_description: Transcribes your meetings in real-time with local inference and automatic language detection.
ai_description: Generates summaries and action items using a local Ollama model.
ai_notInstalled: Ollama is required for local AI notes.
ai_notRunning: Ollama is installed but not running.
ai_modelNotPulled: Ollama is running. Pull Phi-4 Mini to enable summaries.
ai_errorFallback: Ollama model setup failed. Please retry.
footer_allReadyHint: You can start recording with transcription and AI notes enabled.
footer_setupNeeded: Finish setup to unlock full recording workflow
footer_setupNeededHint: Complete both cards above to run transcription and summaries entirely on-device.
context_model_checkError: Unable to check local transcription model status.
context_ollama_openDownloadError: Unable to open the Ollama download page.
context_ollama_pullError: Unable to pull Ollama model. Ensure Ollama is running and retry.
